Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.hash

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.redis.hash

Packages that use org.springframework.data.redis.hash
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
Data structures and interfaces to interact with Redis Streams.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.hash
Dedicated support package for Redis hashes.
org.springframework.data.redis.stream
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.hash used by org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
    Class
    Description
    HashMapper
    Core mapping contract between Java types and Redis hashes/maps.

    Class
    Description
    HashMapper
    Core mapping contract between Java types and Redis hashes/maps.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.hash used by org.springframework.data.redis.hash
    Class
    Description
    HashMapper
    Core mapping contract between Java types and Redis hashes/maps.
    JacksonHashMapper
    ObjectMapper based HashMapper implementation that allows flattening.
    JacksonHashMapper.JacksonHashMapperBuilder
    Builder to create a JacksonHashMapper instance.
    ObjectHashMapper
    HashMapper based on MappingRedisConverter.
